groups.requirements: Add `idlelib` as a native stdlib module in Mamba. This is the IDLE GUI editor internals package, which is Tkinter-based. Since IDLE is rarely used in production, this should be a minimal stub implementation that provides the module namespace and key submodules so that `import idlelib` succeeds without error. No full Tkinter GUI functionality is expected.
questions: Should this be a full implementation or a stub-only module (raising NotImplementedError for GUI operations)?
Which idlelib submodules are most commonly imported and should be prioritized (e.g., idlelib.config, idlelib.run)?
